nasb.text: Build yourselves cities for your little ones, and sheepfolds for your sheep, and do what you have promised.”

esv.text: Build cities for your little ones and folds for your sheep, and do what you have promised.”

cnv.text: 現在你們只管照你們口中所出的話去行，為你們的孩子建城，為你們的羊群築圈。”

ccb.text: 你们现在去为家人筑城邑，为牛羊建围栏吧，但别忘了信守承诺。”
